name: Acidity
description: A burning sensation in the stomach or chest due to excess gastric acid.

name: Acne (Pimples)
description: Inflammatory skin condition caused by clogged pores, leading to pimples and eruptions.

name: Adenoids Enlargement (Adenoid Hypertrophy)
description: Enlarged adenoids (a kind of lymphoid tissue behind the nose) causing nasal blockage, mouth breathing, recurrent ear infections and disturbed sleep in children.

name: ADHD (Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder)
description: A neurodevelopmental disorder causing inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsive behavior.

name: Allergic Rhinitis
description: An allergic condition causing sneezing, runny nose, and nasal irritation.

name: Alopecia
description: Hair loss from the scalp or body due to various underlying causes.

name: Amoebiasis
description: An intestinal infection causing diarrhea, abdominal pain, and discomfort.

name: Anal Fissure (Fissure-in-Ano)
description: A small tear in the anal lining causing pain and bleeding during bowel movements.

name: Anal Fistula (Fistula-in-Ano)
description: An abnormal tunnel near the anus causing discharge and recurrent infection.

name: Anal Warts
description: Viral growths around the anal area caused by HPV infection.

name: Ankylosing Spondylitis
description: A chronic inflammatory condition of the spine causing stiffness and reduced mobility.

name: Anxiety
description: A mental health condition marked by excessive worry, fear, and nervousness.

name: Arthritis
description: Inflammation of joints causing pain, swelling, and stiffness.

name: Asthma
description: A chronic respiratory condition causing breathing difficulty, wheezing, and coughing.

name: Autism (Autism Spectrum Disorder)
description: A developmental disorder affecting communication, behaviour, and social interaction.

name: Baldness
description: Loss of hair from the scalp, often due to genetic or hormonal factors.

name: Bed Wetting (Nocturnal Enuresis)
description: Involuntary urination during sleep, commonly seen in children.

name: Breast Lumps (Fibroadenoma)
description: A benign breast lump commonly seen in young women.

name: Bursitis
description: Inflammation of fluid-filled sacs (bursae) around joints causing pain and swelling.

name: Bronchitis
description: Inflammation of the airways causing persistent cough, mucus, and breathing discomfort.

name: Chalazion
description: A painless, localized swelling on the eyelid due to blocked oil glands.

name: Chickenpox
description: A contagious viral infection causing itchy fluid-filled blisters and fever.

name: Common Cold
description: A viral infection causing runny nose, sneezing, and mild throat irritation.

name: Colitis
description: Inflammation of the colon causing diarrhea, abdominal pain, and discomfort.

name: Constipation
description: Difficulty in passing stool, often with hard or infrequent bowel movements.

name: Corn
description: A thickened area of skin caused by repeated pressure or friction.

name: Cough
description: A protective reflex to clear the airways of irritation or mucus.

name: Cystitis
description: Inflammation of the bladder causing burning urination, urgency, and discomfort.

name: Dandruff
description: A scalp condition causing white flakes and itching due to excessive shedding of skin.

name: Depression
description: A mental health disorder causing persistent low mood, loss of interest, and reduced energy.

name: Diabetes Mellitus (Blood Sugar)
description: A metabolic disorder with high blood sugar due to impaired insulin function.

name: Duodenal Ulcer
description: A sore in the upper part of the intestine causing burning abdominal pain.

name: Ear Infection (Otitis Media)
description: A recurring ear infection with persistent discharge and possible hearing loss.

name: Elephantiasis
description: Severe swelling of body parts due to lymphatic obstruction, often caused by infection.

name: Eczema
description: A chronic skin condition causing itching, redness, and dry, inflamed skin.

name: Endometriosis
description: A condition where tissue similar to the uterine lining grows outside the uterus, causing pain and irregular periods.

name: Epilepsy
description: A neurological disorder characterized by recurrent seizures.

name: Erectile Dysfunction
description: Inability to achieve or maintain an erection sufficient for sexual activity.

name: Fatty Liver
description: Excess fat accumulation in the liver affecting its normal function.

name: Fibroid Uterus
description: Non-cancerous growths in the uterus causing heavy bleeding and pelvic discomfort.

name: Fibromyalgia
description: A chronic condition causing widespread body pain, fatigue, and tender points.

name: Frequent Cough & Cold
description: Repeated episodes of cough or common cold due to lowered immunity or exposure to infections.

name: Fungal Infections (Ringworm)
description: Skin infections caused by fungi leading to itching, redness, and irritation.

name: Fungal Nail Infection
description: A fungal infection causing thickened, discolored, and brittle nails.

name: Gallbladder Inflamation (Cholecystitis)
description: Inflammation of the gallbladder causing abdominal pain, nausea, and fever.

name: Gallbladder Stones (Cholelithiasis)
description: Formation of stones in the gallbladder, which may cause pain or remain silent.

name: Ganglion
description: A fluid-filled swelling near joints or tendons, commonly seen on the wrist.

name: Gastric Ulcer
description: A sore in the stomach lining causing burning pain and discomfort.

name: Gastritis
description: Inflammation of the stomach lining causing pain, acidity, and nausea.

name: Genital Warts
description: Viral growths in the genital area caused by HPV infection.

name: Glomerulonephritis
description: Inflammation of the kidney's filtering units causing swelling, urine changes, and hypertension.

name: Golfer's Elbow
description: Pain and inflammation on the inner side of the elbow due to overuse.

name: Gout
description: A form of arthritis caused by uric acid crystal deposition, leading to severe joint pain.

name: Gynecomastia
description: Enlargement of male breast tissue due to hormonal imbalance.

name: Hair Loss (Hair Fall)
description: Excessive shedding or thinning of hair leading to reduced density or bald patches.

name: Headache (Migraine)
description: A severe, recurring headache often accompanied by nausea and sensitivity to light.

name: Haemorrhoids (Piles)
description: Swollen veins in the anal region causing pain, itching, and bleeding.

name: Heavy Periods (Menorrhagia)
description: Abnormal uterine bleeding not related to pregnancy or identifiable pathology.

name: Hemiplegia
description: Paralysis of one side of the body, usually due to brain injury or stroke.

name: Herpes Simplex
description: A viral infection causing painful blisters on the skin or mucous membranes.

name: Herpes Zoster
description: A viral infection causing a painful rash along the course of a nerve.

name: High BP (Hypertension)
description: A condition of persistently elevated blood pressure increasing health risks.

name: Hyperthyroidism
description: An overactive thyroid gland producing excess hormones, causing weight loss and restlessness.

name: Hypothyroidism
description: An underactive thyroid gland leading to fatigue, weight gain, and slow metabolism.

name: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome)
description: A functional bowel disorder causing irregular bowel habits with abdominal discomfort and bloating.

name: Ichthyosis
description: A skin condition causing dry, thickened, scaly skin due to abnormal shedding.

name: Impotence
description: Inability to achieve or maintain an erection sufficient for sexual activity.

name: Infertility
description: Difficulty in conceiving despite regular unprotected intercourse.

name: Insomnia
description: A sleep disorder characterized by difficulty in falling or staying asleep.

name: Jaundice
description: Yellowing of the skin and eyes due to increased bilirubin levels in the blood.

name: Joint Pain
description: Discomfort or pain in the joints due to inflammation, injury, or degeneration.

name: Juvenile Arthritis
description: A type of arthritis in children causing joint pain, swelling, and stiffness.

name: Keloid
description: Thick, raised scar tissue that grows beyond the original wound.

name: Kidney Stones
description: Hard deposits in kidneys causing pain and urinary discomfort.

name: Laryngitis
description: Inflammation of the voice box causing hoarseness and voice loss.

name: Leucoderma (Vitiligo)
description: Loss of skin pigment leading to white patches on the skin.

name: Lichen Planus
description: An inflammatory skin condition causing itchy, purplish lesions.

name: Lichen Planus Pigmentosa
description: A variant of lichen planus causing dark brown to grayish skin pigmentation.

name: Ligament Injury
description: Damage to a ligament causing pain, swelling, and joint instability.

name: Low BP (Hypotension)
description: Reduced blood pressure causing dizziness, weakness, and fainting.

name: Lumbar Spondylitis
description: Degenerative changes in the lower spine causing back pain and stiffness.

name: Loss of Libido
description: Reduced sexual desire due to physical, hormonal, or psychological factors.

name: Measles
description: A highly contagious viral infection causing fever, cough, and a characteristic skin rash.

name: Menopausal Syndrome
description: A group of symptoms like hot flashes and mood changes due to hormonal decline in menopause.

name: Menstrual Disorders
description: Irregular, painful, or heavy menstrual cycles affecting normal reproductive health.

name: Migraine
description: A severe, throbbing headache often on one side, sometimes with nausea and light sensitivity.

name: Muscle Sprain
description: Overstretching or injury to muscles causing pain and limited movement.

name: Muscular Dystrophy
description: A group of genetic disorders causing progressive muscle weakness and degeneration.

name: Myoma of Uterus
description: A benign tumor of the uterus, also known as uterine fibroid.

name: Nasal Polyps
description: Soft, non-cancerous growths in the nasal passages causing blockage and breathing difficulty.

name: Neck Pain (Cervical Spondylitis)
description: Degenerative changes in the neck causing neck pain, stiffness, and reduced movement.

name: Nephrotic Syndrome
description: A kidney condition causing excessive protein loss in urine, leading to swelling and weakness.

name: Obesity
description: Excess body fat accumulation that increases the risk of health problems like diabetes, heart disease, and joint issues.

name: Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
description: A mental health condition marked by unwanted repetitive thoughts (obsessions) and behaviors (compulsions).

name: Oppositional Defiant Disorder (ODD)
description: A behavioral disorder in children involving persistent defiance, irritability, and disobedience toward authority figures.

name: Oral Herpes
description: A viral infection causing painful blisters or sores around the lips and mouth, commonly known as cold sores.

name: Osteoarthritis
description: A degenerative joint disease where cartilage wears down, leading to pain, stiffness, and reduced movement.

name: Osteomyelitis
description: An infection of the bone causing pain, swelling, and sometimes fever.

name: Osteoporosis
description: A condition where bones become weak and brittle, increasing the risk of fractures.

name: Otitis Externa
description: An infection of the outer ear canal causing pain, itching, and irritation.

name: Ovarian Cyst
description: A fluid-filled sac in or on the ovary, often harmless but sometimes causing pain or menstrual irregularities.

name: PCOD (Polycystic Ovarian Disease)
description: A hormonal disorder affecting the ovaries, leading to irregular periods and cyst formation.

name: Pelvic Inflammatory Disease (PID)
description: An infection of the female reproductive organs causing pelvic pain, discharge, and discomfort.

name: Pharyngitis
description: Inflammation of the throat causing pain, irritation, and difficulty in swallowing.

name: Piles (Hemorrhoids)
description: Swollen veins in the anal region causing pain, itching, and bleeding.

name: PIVD (Prolapsed Intervertebral Disc)
description: A condition where a spinal disc bulges or slips, causing back pain and nerve compression.

name: Premature Ejaculation
description: A condition where ejaculation occurs earlier than desired during sexual activity.

name: Primary Complex
description: An early stage of tuberculosis infection, usually involving the lungs.

name: Prostate Enlargement (BPH)
description: Non-cancerous enlargement of the prostate causing urinary difficulty in men.

name: Prostatitis
description: Inflammation of the prostate gland causing pain, urinary problems, and discomfort.

name: Psoriasis
description: A chronic skin condition causing thick, red patches with silvery scales.

name: Pyelonephritis
description: A bacterial kidney infection causing fever, pain, and urinary symptoms.

name: Restless Leg Syndrome
description: A neurological condition causing an uncontrollable urge to move the legs, usually due to discomfort, especially at night.

name: Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: An autoimmune disorder where the immune system attacks joints, causing pain, swelling, and stiffness.

name: Sciatica
description: Nerve pain radiating from the lower back down the leg, often due to nerve compression.

name: Scurf
description: A severe form of dandruff with excessive flaking of the scalp.

name: Seborrheic Dermatitis
description: An inflammatory skin condition caused by Seborrhoea, leading to redness, itching and flaky (dandruff like) skin.

name: Sinusitis
description: Inflammation of the sinuses causing congestion, facial pain, and headache.

name: Stress
description: A state of mental or physical strain affecting overall health and well-being.

name: Stye
description: A painful, pus-filled swelling on the eyelid caused by infection.

name: Tinea Alba (Pityriasis Alba)
description: A mild fungal skin infection causing light-colored patches, usually on the face or arms.

name: Tinea Corporis
description: A fungal infection of the body causing ring-shaped, itchy skin rashes.

name: Tinea Versicolor (Pityriasis Versicolor)
description: A common fungal infection causing discolored patches on the skin, especially on the chest and back.

name: Tonsillitis
description: Inflammation of the tonsils causing sore throat, pain on swallowing, and fever.

name: Trigeminal Neuralgia
description: A nerve disorder causing sudden, severe facial pain along the trigeminal nerve.

name: Typhoid
description: A bacterial infection causing prolonged fever, weakness, and abdominal symptoms, usually spread through contaminated food and water.

name: Ulcerative Colitis
description: A chronic inflammatory condition of the colon causing diarrhea, abdominal pain, and bleeding.

name: Urinary Tract Infection (UTI)
description: An infection of the urinary system causing burning urination, urgency, and discomfort.

name: Urticaria
description: An allergic skin condition causing sudden, itchy, raised swellings (hives) on the skin.

name: Varicose Veins
description: Enlarged, twisted veins (usually in the legs) causing pain, swelling, and heaviness.

name: Vertigo
description: A sensation of spinning or dizziness due to inner ear or balance disorders.

name: Vitiligo (Leucoderma, White Patches)
description: A skin condition causing loss of pigment, leading to white patches on the skin.

name: Vocal Cord Nodules
description: Benign growths on the vocal cords causing hoarseness and voice strain.

name: Warts
description: Viral skin growths caused by HPV, appearing as rough, raised lesions.

name: Weight Loss (Obesity)
description: Excess body weight due to abnormal fat accumulation affecting overall health.

name: Writer's Cramp
description: A task-specific muscle disorder causing hand pain and difficulty while writing.
